titles.en: Chapter on a Man Who Makes a Bequest, but the Executor Forgets it and Only Remembers One Part of it
Chapter on a Man Who Makes a Bequest, but the Executor Forgets it and Only Remembers One Part of it

segments: : كَتَبْتُ إِلَيْهِ يَعْنِي عَلِيَّ بْنَ مُحَمَّدٍ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ أَسْأَلُهُ عَنْ إِنْسَانٍ أَوْصَى بِوَصِيَّةٍ فَلَمْ يَحْفَظِ اَلْوَصِيُّ إِلاَّ بَاباً وَاحِداً مِنْهَا كَيْفَ يَصْنَعُ فِي اَلْبَاقِي فَوَقَّعَ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ "اَلْأَبْوَابَ اَلْبَاقِيَةَ اِجْعَلْهَا فِي اَلْبِرِّ".
arabic.text: : كَتَبْتُ إِلَيْهِ يَعْنِي عَلِيَّ بْنَ مُحَمَّدٍ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ أَسْأَلُهُ عَنْ إِنْسَانٍ أَوْصَى بِوَصِيَّةٍ فَلَمْ يَحْفَظِ اَلْوَصِيُّ إِلاَّ بَاباً وَاحِداً مِنْهَا كَيْفَ يَصْنَعُ فِي اَلْبَاقِي فَوَقَّعَ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ "اَلْأَبْوَابَ اَلْبَاقِيَةَ اِجْعَلْهَا فِي اَلْبِرِّ".

segments:
Hadith.5513 - Muhammad ibn Al-Hasan Al-Saffar, may Allah (swt) be pleased with him, narrated from Sahl ibn Ziyad from Muhammad ibn Rayyan, who said:
I wrote to Imam (as) - meaning Imam Ali ibn Muhammad Al-Hadi (as) - asking about a person who had made a will, but the executor only remembered one part of it. What should be done with the remaining parts?
Imam (as) replied: "Allocate the remaining parts to charitable acts."
en.bab-ul-qaim-publications.text:
Hadith.5513 - Muhammad ibn Al-Hasan Al-Saffar, may Allah (swt) be pleased with him, narrated from Sahl ibn Ziyad from Muhammad ibn Rayyan, who said:
I wrote to Imam (as) - meaning Imam Ali ibn Muhammad Al-Hadi (as) - asking about a person who had made a will, but the executor only remembered one part of it. What should be done with the remaining parts?
Imam (as) replied: "Allocate the remaining parts to charitable acts."

narratorChain.raw: 5513 - رَوَى مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ اَلْحَسَنِ اَلصَّفَّارُ رَضِيَ اَللَّهُ عَنْهُ عَنْ سَهْلِ بْنِ زِيَادٍ عَنْ مُحَمَّدِ بْنِ رَيَّانَ قَالَ

parts.text: مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ اَلْحَسَنِ اَلصَّفَّارُ رَضِيَ اَللَّهُ عَنْهُ
